assurance_use: dataset card review, stakeholder-specific documentation checklist, dataset lifecycle governance, and model/data release evidence
author: Mahima Pushkarna, Andrew Zaldivar, and Oddur Kjartansson
claim_scope: Data Cards for purposeful, stakeholder-centered dataset documentation across origins, collection, annotation, intended use, evaluation context, lifecycle changes, and responsible AI review
note: ACM FAccT paper introducing Data Cards as structured, purposeful, human-centered summaries of dataset facts needed by stakeholders across a dataset lifecycle for responsible AI development.
refresh_trigger: Data Cards paper, ACM record, arXiv record, dataset-documentation practice, or scholarly consensus materially changes
rights_dimension: dataset transparency, stakeholder comprehension, fairness review, accountable reuse, and lifecycle documentation
stakeholder_role: data steward, dataset creator, model owner, assurance reviewer, instructor, learner, and affected-user representative
title: Data Cards: Purposeful and Transparent Dataset Documentation for Responsible AI
verification_note: Direct arXiv source URL verified live 2026-06-09 with title, authors, abstract, and ACM FAccT 2022 metadata matching the cited Data Cards paper.
